---
agent: Instruction Generator
---


Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for itin the /docs directorey. if a .md file is provided please use that otherwise generate an appropiate filename based on the generated content. Make sure that the instructions are consise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to refrence this new docs file. if no information is provided, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of archicteture or coding standards documents.
